sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n39466" key="e)piqrau/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιθραύω</orth>, <sense id="n39466.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">break besides</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τρύφος ἄρτου</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.105</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Apollonid.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
